uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame; wire semantics confirmed against reference/upstream-codec.js (Volt=3.0, WaterLeak=Leak). Normalized expected.data authored here: leak status byte (bytes[4]) != 0 -> water.leak true; battery bytes[3]/10 -> battery V.
Synthetic in-bounds frame; reference yields Volt=2.8, WaterLeak=NoLeak. Normalized: bytes[4]==0 -> water.leak false.

uplink.description: Status report, no leak, low-battery flag set (battery 2.2 V)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame; reference yields Volt='2.2(low battery)' (high bit of bytes[3] set). Normalized: low-battery bit -> extra lowBattery true; voltage is the low 7 bits /10.

uplink.description: Device info / startup frame carries no measurement
uplink._note: Synthetic startup frame (reportType bytes[2]==0x00); reference returns version/datecode info, not a measurement. We report an error rather than emit a non-measurement object.

uplink.description: Config response on fPort 7 carries no measurement
uplink._note: Synthetic config-report response; reference returns a Cmd/Status config object on fPort 7, not a measurement. Only fPort 6 data reports are decoded.
